title: 12pc Bettina Golden Fleece Scouring Cloths Washing Up Scrubbing Sponge Cloths
features: 6 x Bettina pack of 2 golden fleece scouring cloths.(12 cloths in total).

The Bettina golden fleece scouring cloths offers a convenient and effective solution for your cleaning needs. The scouring cloths are made from high-quality golden fleece material. Golden fleece typically refers to a soft and absorbent fabric with good scrubbing capabilities, making it ideal for various cleaning tasks.

Golden fleece material is known for its scouring ability without scratching surfaces. It can effectively remove tough stains, grime, and residue from different surfaces without causing damage, making it suitable for kitchenware, countertops, sinks, and more.

The golden fleece material is durable and long-lasting, ensuring that the cloths can withstand repeated use and washing without losing their cleaning effectiveness. Whether you need to scrub pots and pans, wipe down surfaces, or tackle tough stains, these cloths provide a reliable cleaning solution.
Each pack includes 2 scouring cloths, providing you with a backup for extended use or for handling different cleaning jobs simultaneously. Each cloth measures approximately L14cm W12cm x H 0.3cm.
